title: Harsh Encounters
description: Adds custom strong bosses to the game.
body:
# Bosses:

## Deviser:

![Deviser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deb11414062633dd32951b5a0e9f2552e6cac573.png)

Health: 440
Armor: 13

A Golem-like Sentinel with control over thunder. Don't be shocked!

Has a range of attacks, melee and ranged. Can stab and grab you, dealing big damage while you are grabbed, and is able to summon a rain of spears at phase 1. Can apply electrified from most melee hits, increasing damage from lasers, so it is advisable to dodge. Has 2 phases (summons rain at phase 2 as well as able to dodge and uses 2 more devastating attacks). 

Can be summoned (for the meantime) by crafting a Thunderer Summoner block (3 diamonds, 1 netherite ingot and 3 of any stone), right click on the placed block to summon the boss. When defeated, drops Thunderium and Thunderous Essence, which are used to create 2 new weapons, Thunder Spear and Deviser Gauntlet, both allowing you to harness some of the boss' attacks.

Boss Music used: Nemesis by Light Canvas.


## Scorched Knight:

![Scorched Knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfea95078bcac239dcff3cd16dbe0cbe6f69a4cb.png)

Health: 270
Armor: 15

Who or what is in that armor? A human? A blaze? Both!? All we know is that it wants to burn all its foes into the ground.....

Consists of melee attacks, a charge, slam, jump, and a special, dangerous move that leaves the boss stunned afterwards. Can apply a DoT called Scorched, which reduces a players offense and defense slightly. Can be found in the nether.

Boss Music used: Dragon Fire by Makai Symphony

## The Silent Swordmaster (W.I.P):

![The Silent Swordmaster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06b8e6bcdb8684f7eb84534522437fb9a2ed3423.png)

Health: 700
Armor: 27

Only phase 1 as of now:
Can dodge & block attacks, can grab and lift you in the air and slam. Has a fire wave attack that can heal the boss when it hurts you, then it can summon small tornados that carry and damage you. Has a dash and a jump attack.

Note: If your system isnt that great, I'd recommend disabling the boss' shadow trail in the config for better performance.
